detaileddescription.para: Type to define a unique sync point.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's local position.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current position, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Allows setting an Actor's local position from the Frame callback function for the current frame only.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
This will get reset to the internally calculated or previously baked value in the next frame, so will have to be set again.

briefdescription.para: Allows baking an Actor's local position from the Frame callback function.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
The value is saved so will cause undesired effects if this property is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's local orientation.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current orientation, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Allows setting an Actor's local orientation from the Frame callback function for the current frame only.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
This will get reset to the internally calculated or previously baked value in the next frame, so will have to be set again.

briefdescription.para: Allows baking an Actor's local orientation from the Frame callback function.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
The value is saved so will cause undesired effects if this property is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's size.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current size, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Allows setting an Actor's size from the Frame callback function for the current frame only.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
This will get reset to the internally calculated or previously baked value in the next frame, so will have to be set again.

briefdescription.para: Allows baking an Actor's size from the Frame callback function.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
The value is saved so will cause undesired effects if this property is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's local position and size.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current position, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current size, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's world position and size.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current world position, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current world scale, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current size, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t id, Vector3 &position, Vector3 &scale, Quaternion &orientation, Vector3 &size) const
memberdef.name: GetWorldTransformAndSize

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's world transform properties and size.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current world position, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current world scale, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current world orientation, if Actor ID is valid
Set to the Actor's current size, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's local scale.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current scale, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Allows setting an Actor's local scale from the Frame callback function for the current frame only.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
This will get reset to the internally calculated or previously baked value in the next frame, so will have to be set again.

briefdescription.para: Allows baking an Actor's local scale from the Frame callback function.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
The value is saved so will cause undesired effects if this property is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, this retrieves that Actor's local color.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current color, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Allows setting an Actor's local color from the Frame callback function for the current frame only.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
This will get reset to the internally calculated or previously baked value in the next frame, so will have to be set again.

briefdescription.para: Allows baking an Actor's local color from the Frame callback function.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.
The value is saved so will cause undesired effects if this property is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Pop a sync point off the stack.

detaileddescription.para:
Sync points can be added from the event side using Dali::DevelStage::NotifyFrameCallback().
INVALID_SYNC if there was no SyncPoint, or a unique value if there was a sync point.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, Gets the updated area of the actor.

parameterdescription.para: Get to the Actor's current updated area, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Given the Actor ID, Sets the updated area of the actor.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current updated area, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Sets an Actor's ignored state from the Frame callback function. The change is applied immediately and persists until changed again.

parameterdescription.para: True to make the actor be ignored.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Gets an Actor's ignored state from the Frame callback function.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current ignored state, if Actor ID is valid

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Gets an Actor's custom animatable property value from the Frame callback function.

parameterdescription.para: Get to the Actor's current custom property value.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: Bake an Actor's custom animatable property value from the Frame callback function. The type of propety and value should be matched.

parameterdescription.para: Set to the Actor's current custom property value, if Actor ID and Property is valid.

simplesect.para: Whether the method call was successful or not.

briefdescription.para: This class is used to access data of the actors from the update-thread.

detaileddescription.para: The Actor API CANNOT be called directly from the update-thread. This class can be used as a proxy to that required Actor data. An actor's data can be accessed using the Actor's Unique ID. The unique ID should be passed to the callback using this class in a thread-safe manner (as you cannot call Actor::GetId from the update-thread).
